NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:DANIELLE ADEBZADE C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND CASE SETTLED, ON RECORD, AS FOLLOWS: THIS IS A JUDGMENT FOR PLFF AGAINST DEFT FOR THE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1626 JENNINGS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA;PLFF WAIVES RENT AND DAMAGES,COST AND ATTY'S FEE.WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH BUT ACTUAL EVICTION STAYED TO 5/8/95. PLFF RETAINS THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. (STIPULATION SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES SUBMITTED AND A JUDGMENT PREPARED BY PLFF'S COUNSEL SUBMITTED TO COURT - JUDGMENT SIZED BY COURT)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ALISHA

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ALISHA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ALISHA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ALISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1626 JENNINGS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA, STAYED UNTIL MAY-08-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
